critical_issues.title: Validator not integrated into runtime flow
critical_issues.resolution: Integrated validate_roster_response into fetch_1985_yankees_roster and raise typed RosterValidationError on validation failures.

critical_issues.title: Non-dict top-level response raised exception instead of typed error
critical_issues.resolution: Added top-level response type guard returning ValidationErrorKind.SCHEMA_FAILURE.

suggestions.title: Add runtime-level test for typed validation failure
suggestions.resolution: Added tests for schema-invalid object payload and non-object payload, both asserting typed RosterValidationError.

suggestions.title: Preserve invalid payload for failed/blob write path
suggestions.resolution: Extended RosterValidationError to include response_payload so callers can write failed/raw payload blobs.

suggestions.title: Validate response before .get access in client
suggestions.resolution: Hardened token_count/player_count extraction with isinstance(response_json, dict) guards before .get access.
